More AUVIC Team Members

Robosub 2025 Competition Results

AUVIC placed 29th at the Robosub 2025 competition. The competition featured teams from around the world, with first place going to a team from Singapore.

Robosub 2025 Results

Goals for the Robosub 2026 Competition

The team is focused on teamwork, refining systems, and building on lessons learned to achieve stronger performance in the Robosub 2026 competition.
